topics.display_name: Which Original Avenger Matches Your Personality?

synopsis.title: Which Original Avenger Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Are you the leader of the pack or the genius behind the scenes? Whether you're smashing through obstacles or calculating your next move, your personality aligns with one of Earth's Mightiest Heroes. Take this quiz to find out which member of the 2012 team matches your vibe and discover your true role in the squad.

characters.name: Iron Man
characters.short_description: You are a visionary genius who uses intellect and charisma to solve complex problems and lead through innovation.
characters.profile_text: You possess a quick-witted mind that is always three steps ahead of everyone else in the room. Your confidence is your greatest asset, allowing you to take bold risks that others wouldn't dream of, though it can sometimes be mistaken for arrogance. You thrive in high-pressure environments where you can apply your technical skills or creative problem-solving to protect those you care about, often feeling a deep sense of responsibility for the world's future. Your tendency to handle everything yourself can lead to isolation or burnout. You might struggle with vulnerability, using humor or sarcasm as a shield to keep others at a distance. Learning to trust your team and admit when you are wrong is your path to true growth, ensuring your brilliance serves the collective good rather than just your own ego.

characters.name: Captain America
characters.short_description: You are a principled leader with an unwavering moral compass and a deep commitment to justice and teamwork.
characters.profile_text: You are defined by your integrity and your refusal to back down from what you believe is right, regardless of the odds. People naturally look to you for guidance because you lead by example, demonstrating courage and selflessness in every action. You value tradition and loyalty, often acting as the glue that holds your social or professional circles together during times of crisis. Your rigid adherence to your ideals can sometimes make you stubborn or out of touch with modern complexities. You may carry the weight of the world on your shoulders, feeling a personal failure if you cannot save everyone. Finding a balance between your duty to others and your own personal happiness is essential for your long-term well-being, allowing you to lead without losing yourself in the process.

characters.name: Thor
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and spirited individual who balances a regal sense of duty with a boisterous love for life and adventure.
characters.profile_text: You carry yourself with a natural authority and a zest for life that draws people toward your infectious energy. Whether you are celebrating a victory or facing a daunting challenge, you do so with a grandiosity that inspires those around you. You are deeply protective of your family and heritage, often feeling a heavy burden of expectation that you strive to live up to through acts of bravery and strength. Your impulsiveness and pride can occasionally lead to reckless decisions that have far-reaching consequences. You might struggle with your identity when stripped of your status or tools, needing to learn that your true worth comes from your character rather than your power. Embracing humility allows you to become the wise leader you were always meant to be, tempering your might with mercy.

characters.name: Hulk
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant and gentle soul who possesses immense hidden strength and struggles to balance your dual nature.
characters.profile_text: You are likely a quiet, intellectual person who prefers the peace of a laboratory or a book over the chaos of the spotlight. You possess a deep well of empathy and a desire to help humanity through science and reason, yet you are acutely aware of the powerful emotions simmering beneath your calm exterior. This duality makes you cautious, as you understand better than anyone the impact your actions can have when you lose control. You may spend too much time fearing your own potential or suppressing your feelings, which can lead to explosive outbursts later on. Your self-imposed isolation can prevent you from forming the connections you need to feel safe. Learning to integrate all parts of yourself, the thinker and the fighter, is the key to finding inner peace and true power.

characters.name: Black Widow
characters.short_description: You are a highly skilled and pragmatic strategist who values competence, discretion, and the redemption of your past.
characters.profile_text: You are a master of adaptation, able to navigate any social or professional situation with grace and calculated precision. Your past has taught you the value of secrets and the importance of staying several moves ahead of your adversaries. While you may appear guarded or stoic, you possess a fierce loyalty to the few people you trust, often going to extreme lengths to ensure their safety and success. Your reliance on self-sufficiency can make it difficult for you to ask for help or open up emotionally to those around you. You might struggle with feelings of guilt or a sense that you are defined by your mistakes, leading you to constantly seek ways to prove your worth. Recognizing that you are more than your utility to others is vital for your personal fulfillment and growth.

characters.name: Hawkeye
characters.short_description: You are a grounded and observant specialist who relies on precision, reliability, and a deep devotion to your loved ones.
characters.profile_text: You are the person who sees what everyone else misses, providing a unique perspective and a steady hand when things get chaotic. You don't need the spotlight to feel valued; instead, you take pride in your craftsmanship and your ability to deliver results under pressure. Your life is anchored by your personal values and the people you consider family, making you the most relatable and human member of any high-stakes team. You may sometimes feel overlooked or underappreciated compared to more flamboyant personalities, leading to a quiet resentment. Your protective nature can also turn into a self-sacrificial streak that puts you in unnecessary danger for the sake of others. Remembering that your presence is just as vital as the heavy hitters helps you maintain the confidence needed to hit every mark you set for yourself.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a major crisis disrupts your plans, what is your immediate instinctive reaction?

options.text: I analyze the data and start building a creative, high-tech solution.
I step up to organize the group and ensure everyone follows a moral course of action.
I dive headfirst into the challenge with energy and confidence, trusting my strength.
I retreat to a quiet space to process my emotions and think through the logic.
I observe from the sidelines, gathering intel before making a precise move.
I focus on protecting my inner circle and providing reliable support where it's needed most.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these roles do you naturally gravitate toward when working in a team?

options.text: The visionary who provides the big ideas and the resources.
The strategist who keeps the team's values and discipline intact.
The powerhouse who inspires others through bold, charismatic action.
The specialist who handles the complex, behind-the-scenes technicalities.
The versatile operative who can adapt to any role to get the job done.
The observant anchor who keeps the team grounded and watches their back.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle your own mistakes or past failures?

options.text: I use humor or sarcasm to deflect while I obsessively try to fix the error.
I take full responsibility and work tirelessly to make amends through duty.
I view them as lessons in humility that will eventually make me a better leader.
I feel a deep sense of guilt and worry about the potential damage I've caused.
I treat them as data points, focusing on redemption through future competence.
I acknowledge them quietly and double down on my commitment to those I love.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your preferred environment for relaxation and recharging?

options.text: A high-energy social gathering or a workshop filled with new gadgets.
Somewhere quiet and traditional that reminds me of home and my roots.
A grand celebration with friends, food, and lively storytelling.
A peaceful, isolated library or laboratory where I can be alone with my thoughts.
A discreet, comfortable location where I can maintain my privacy.
At home with family or close friends, away from the noise of the world.

baseline_questions.question_text: What do you value most in your closest friends and allies?

options.text: Intelligence and the ability to keep up with my fast-paced mind.
Integrity and a shared commitment to doing the right thing.
Loyalty and the courage to stand by me in the heat of battle.
Patience and an understanding of my complex, sometimes difficult nature.
Reliability and the ability to keep a secret when it matters most.
Authenticity and a grounded perspective on what really matters in life.

topics.display_name: Which 'The Office' Employee Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Dunder Mifflin Employee Are You Actually?
synopsis.summary: Ever feel like you're surrounded by idiots, or maybe you're the one pulling the pranks? From the World's Best Boss to the Assistant to the Regional Manager, everyone has a Dunder Mifflin alter ego. Take this quiz to find out if you're the heart of the office or just here for the Pretzel Day.

characters.name: Michael Scott
characters.short_description: You are a well-meaning but socially awkward leader who craves connection and validation above all else.
characters.profile_text: You possess a boundless need to be liked and often prioritize office camaraderie over actual productivity. Your heart is usually in the right place, but your lack of self-awareness leads to cringe-worthy situations and unintentional offense. You view your coworkers as your family, which makes you fiercely loyal, even if your methods of showing it are unconventional or disruptive. Your strengths lie in your genuine passion and occasional flashes of sales brilliance. However, your pitfalls include a desperate need for attention and a tendency to procrastinate on difficult decisions. You thrive when you feel like the center of the room, yet you must learn that true leadership often involves listening more than talking.

characters.name: Dwight Schrute
characters.short_description: You are a disciplined, intense, and fiercely loyal individual with a strict moral code and a passion for efficiency.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate rule-follower, valuing hierarchy, tradition, and hard work above social niceties. Your dedication to your craft is unmatched, and you take immense pride in your survival skills and agricultural knowledge. While others might see you as eccentric or overbearing, you view yourself as the necessary backbone of the organization, always prepared for any disaster. Your greatest strength is your unwavering reliability and drive to succeed. On the downside, your lack of social tact and competitive nature can alienate those around you. You often struggle to understand sarcasm or nuance, preferring a world that is black and white. To grow, you need to realize that teamwork requires empathy just as much as it requires authority.

characters.name: Jim Halpert
characters.short_description: You are a charming, laid-back observer who uses humor and wit to navigate the mundanity of daily life.
characters.profile_text: You often find yourself feeling overqualified for your surroundings, leading you to use pranks and dry wit as a coping mechanism. You are naturally likable and possess a high level of emotional intelligence, allowing you to read people and situations with ease. While you might seem unmotivated at times, you are deeply driven by your personal relationships and the people you care about. Your strengths include your adaptability and your ability to keep a cool head under pressure. However, your tendency to coast can prevent you from reaching your full potential if you aren't careful. You sometimes hide your true ambitions behind a mask of irony, but when you finally commit to a goal or a person, you are all in.

characters.name: Pam Beesly
characters.short_description: You are a kind-hearted, artistic soul who is gradually finding your voice and the courage to pursue your dreams.
characters.profile_text: You are often the glue that holds a chaotic environment together, offering a sympathetic ear and a steady hand. For a long time, you may have played it safe, staying in your comfort zone and letting others make decisions for you. However, you possess a quiet strength and a creative spark that eventually demands to be seen and heard. Your empathy and patience are your greatest assets, making you a trusted friend and a stabilizing force. Your main pitfall is a tendency to undersell yourself or avoid conflict to keep the peace. As you grow, you learn that setting boundaries and speaking your truth doesn't make you unkind; it makes you a more confident and fulfilled person.

characters.name: Andy Bernard
characters.short_description: You are an enthusiastic, Ivy League-educated performer who masks deep-seated insecurities with song and school spirit.
characters.profile_text: You are constantly seeking approval and will go to great lengths to fit in or impress your superiors. Whether it is through a sudden burst of a cappella or a desperate attempt at personality mirroring, you want to be the most memorable person in the room. You are prone to emotional outbursts when things don't go your way, reflecting a sensitive nature that is easily bruised. Your strengths are your high energy and your willingness to commit fully to any task or hobby. Unfortunately, your desire for validation can make you come across as sycophantic or unstable. You struggle with anger management and identity issues, but your journey is one of learning to be comfortable in your own skin without the need for constant applause.

characters.name: Angela Martin
characters.short_description: You are a fastidious, judgmental, and deeply traditional person who finds comfort in order, cats, and strict standards.
characters.profile_text: You have very little patience for frivolity or incompetence, often expressing your disapproval through a sharp look or a biting comment. You hold yourself and everyone else to an impossibly high standard, valuing morality and religious devotion above all else. While you may seem cold or unapproachable, you have a hidden depth of passion and a fierce protective streak for those you deem worthy. Your organizational skills and attention to detail are unparalleled, ensuring that everything runs exactly as it should. However, your rigidity and tendency to hold grudges can make you difficult to work with. You often use your high standards as a shield to keep others at a distance, fearing that vulnerability might be seen as a weakness.

topics.display_name: Which Spider-Verse Variant Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Spider-Verse Variant Are You?
synopsis.summary: Step into the Multiverse and discover which web-slinger matches your unique personality. Whether you are a tech genius, a punk rock rebel, or a noir detective, there is a Spider-Person out there just like you. Take this quiz to find your place in the Great Web and see which hero you would be in the Spider-Society!

characters.name: Miles Morales
characters.short_description: You are a creative and resilient individual who is carving out your own unique legacy while balancing the weight of high expectations.
characters.profile_text: You possess a vibrant spirit and an artistic soul, often finding expression through your unique perspective on the world. While you might feel like an outsider or struggle with the pressure of living up to those who came before you, your innate sense of justice and your ability to adapt make you a natural leader. You aren't afraid to do things your own way, even when the path isn't clearly marked, and your empathy allows you to connect with people from all walks of life. Your greatest strength lies in your authenticity and your refusal to be put into a box. However, you may sometimes doubt your own readiness for the challenges ahead, leading to moments of hesitation. You thrive when you embrace your individuality and trust your instincts, proving that being different is your most powerful asset. Your journey is one of self-discovery, and you are constantly learning how to balance your personal desires with the responsibilities you carry for your community.

characters.name: Gwen Stacy (Ghost-Spider)
characters.short_description: You are a graceful and independent spirit who values deep connections but often guards your heart to protect those you love.
characters.profile_text: You move through life with a rhythmic grace, often finding solace in music and the arts as a way to process your complex emotions. You are fiercely independent and highly capable, often preferring to handle problems on your own rather than risking the safety of others. This self-reliance is a double-edged sword; while it makes you incredibly resilient, it can also lead to feelings of isolation. You carry the weight of past mistakes with a quiet dignity, using them as fuel to ensure you never let your guard down again. In social situations, you are cool and composed, but those who truly know you see the deep loyalty and warmth you hide beneath the surface. Your pitfall is your tendency to push people away when things get difficult, fearing that getting too close will only lead to pain. Learning to trust others and share your burdens is your greatest challenge, but when you do, you become an unstoppable force for good.

characters.name: Peter B. Parker
characters.short_description: You are a seasoned and relatable mentor who has weathered life's storms and emerged with a weary but enduring sense of humor.
characters.profile_text: You have seen it all and have the scars to prove it, yet you haven't lost your fundamental desire to help others. Life hasn't always been easy for you, and you’ve faced your fair share of setbacks, but you use your experiences to guide the next generation with a mix of cynicism and genuine care. You might come across as a bit disheveled or unmotivated at times, but when the stakes are high, your competence and tactical brilliance shine through. You value comfort and honesty over pretense, and you aren't afraid to admit when you've messed up. Your greatest strength is your resilience; no matter how many times you get knocked down, you always find a way to get back up, even if you complain about your back the whole time. Your pitfall is a tendency toward self-pity or stagnation when things go wrong, but your heart is too big to stay down for long. You find purpose in being the person you wish you had when you were starting out.

characters.name: Hobie Brown (Spider-Punk)
characters.short_description: You are a rebellious and effortlessly cool iconoclast who fights against any form of systemic oppression with style and noise.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate anti-establishment figure, possessing a natural charisma that draws people to your cause without you even trying. You despise labels, rules, and anything that feels like a "canon" you are forced to follow. Your approach to life is improvisational and loud, much like a punk rock anthem, and you use your creativity as a weapon against those who seek to control others. You are fiercely loyal to your friends and will go to the ends of the earth to support someone you believe in, but you have zero patience for bureaucracy or self-importance. Your strength lies in your ability to see through the nonsense and act with total conviction. However, your disdain for structure can sometimes make it difficult for you to work within a team that requires strict coordination. You prefer to lead by example, showing everyone that the best way to change the world is to be unapologetically yourself. You are a reminder that true power comes from the people, not the institutions.

characters.name: Spider-Man Noir
characters.short_description: You are a gritty and dramatic soul who views the world through a lens of stark morality and hard-boiled determination.
characters.profile_text: You carry yourself with the weight of a detective in a noir film, finding beauty in the shadows and the stark contrast between right and wrong. You are a person of few words but decisive action, often preferring the quiet intensity of the night to the chaos of the day. You have a penchant for the dramatic and a deep appreciation for the simpler things in life, like a good egg cream or the satisfaction of a job well done. Your worldview is shaped by a sense of justice that is as unyielding as iron, and you have little tolerance for those who exploit the weak. You are incredibly tough and can endure physical and emotional hardships that would break others. Your pitfall is your tendency to see things in black and white, which can sometimes blind you to the nuances of a situation or the possibility of redemption. You are a sentinel of the past, bringing a timeless sense of duty to every challenge you face, and you never back down from a fight against injustice.

characters.name: Miguel O'Hara (Spider-Man 2099)
characters.short_description: You are a disciplined and intense visionary who is willing to make the hardest choices to ensure the stability of the future.
characters.profile_text: You are driven by a profound sense of responsibility and a logical mind that prioritizes the big picture over individual desires. You often find yourself in positions of leadership because of your unwavering focus and your ability to remain calm under immense pressure. You don't have much time for jokes or distractions, as you are constantly aware of the fragile threads that hold reality together. This intensity can make you seem cold or unapproachable, but it stems from a deep-seated fear of failure and the catastrophic consequences that would follow. You are a strategist who thinks several steps ahead, always prepared for the worst-case scenario. Your greatest strength is your dedication to the mission, but your greatest pitfall is your rigidity. You may struggle to accept that some things are beyond your control or that the "correct" path isn't always the most humane one. Learning to balance your cold logic with a bit of empathy is your ongoing struggle, but your commitment to protecting the world is unquestionable.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex problem that affects many people, what is your primary decision-making driver?

options.text: Protecting the structural integrity and long-term stability of the system.
Following my personal moral compass, even if it disrupts the status quo.
Finding a creative, middle-ground solution that honors my own unique path.
Dismantling the system entirely if it feels oppressive or restrictive.
Applying hard-earned wisdom and humor to keep everyone calm and grounded.
Seeking a clear-cut, black-and-white resolution based on absolute justice.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle the weight of high expectations from others?

options.text: I feel the pressure deeply but use it as motivation to define my own legacy.
I internalize it, often isolating myself to ensure I don't let anyone down.
I accept it as a necessary burden of leadership and demand total discipline.
I deflect it with self-deprecation, knowing I've already made my share of mistakes.
I ignore them entirely; I don't believe in following anyone else's 'canon'.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you find most conducive to your personal growth?

options.text: A high-tech, organized command center where logic and strategy prevail.
A vibrant, urban landscape filled with art and diverse perspectives.
A quiet, moody atmosphere where I can focus on the stark realities of life.
A chaotic, high-energy scene where I can express my rebellion through noise.
A creative studio or rehearsal space where I can process my emotions through rhythm.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest fear when working as part of a team?

options.text: That my presence will inadvertently cause harm to those I care about.
That the team will become too bureaucratic or start enforcing rigid rules.
That a lack of discipline will lead to a catastrophic, systemic failure.
That I won't be able to live up to the standard set by those who came before me.
That I'm too 'washed up' or cynical to provide the guidance they actually need.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to communicate your most important ideas?

options.text: Through decisive action and few, well-chosen words.
Through improvisational performance and unapologetic self-expression.
Through mentorship, storytelling, and a bit of relatable honesty.
Through artistic mediums that capture a unique, modern perspective.
Through precise data, clear directives, and logical arguments.

topics.display_name: Which Gotham City Villain Is Your Alter Ego?

synopsis.title: Which Gotham City Villain Is Your Secret Alter Ego?
synopsis.summary: Gotham City is a playground for the brilliant, the broken, and the bold, where every dark alleyway tells a story of ambition gone wrong. Whether you are plotting a high-stakes heist from the Iceberg Lounge or sowing beautiful chaos in the streets, your inner rogue is waiting to be revealed. Take this quiz to discover which iconic criminal mastermind matches your unique brand of mayhem and claim your throne in the underworld.

characters.name: The Joker
characters.short_description: You are the embodiment of chaotic unpredictability, thriving in the madness of Gotham’s dark alleys and abandoned amusement parks.
characters.profile_text:
You view the world as one giant, cruel joke, and you are the only one who truly understands the punchline. Your strength lies in your absolute lack of fear and your ability to disrupt any established order with a single, well-placed spark of mayhem. You do not care for wealth or power in the traditional sense; instead, you seek to prove that everyone is just one bad day away from losing their sanity. You are a master of theatricality, turning every confrontation into a spectacle that leaves your enemies questioning their own reality.

However, your obsession with chaos can make you your own worst enemy, as you often prioritize a grand gesture over your own survival. You struggle to maintain long-term alliances because your volatility eventually alienates even the most loyal followers. While your mind is a labyrinth of brilliant, twisted ideas, your refusal to follow any rules—even your own—means you are constantly dancing on the edge of total self-destruction.

characters.name: The Penguin
characters.short_description: You are a sophisticated mastermind who rules Gotham’s underworld from the opulent shadows of the Iceberg Lounge.
characters.profile_text:
You value class, influence, and the finer things in life, using your sharp intellect and vast resources to maintain a stranglehold on the city's criminal economy. Unlike those who seek destruction, you prefer the stability of a well-run empire where you pull the strings from behind a velvet curtain. Your strengths include your meticulous planning and your ability to navigate high-society circles just as easily as the backrooms of a dockside warehouse. You are a survivor who has turned your insecurities into a formidable armor of wealth and prestige.

Your deep-seated need for respect and your fragile ego are your greatest vulnerabilities. You are prone to fits of rage when you feel slighted, which can lead to impulsive decisions that threaten the very empire you have worked so hard to build. While you are a brilliant strategist, your desire to be seen as a legitimate businessman often conflicts with your ruthless criminal nature, creating a tension that your enemies can exploit if they know where to look.

characters.name: Catwoman
characters.short_description: You are a sleek and independent spirit who navigates the rooftops of Gotham with unmatched grace and a moral code all your own.
characters.profile_text:
You are driven by a desire for freedom and the thrill of the heist, operating in the grey areas between hero and villain. You possess an incredible talent for stealth and a keen eye for the city's most valuable treasures, often taking what you want while leaving the authorities baffled. Your independence is your greatest asset, allowing you to move through Gotham’s social strata without being tied down by the baggage of a traditional criminal organization. You are highly adaptable and possess a sharp wit that keeps your opponents off balance.

Your reluctance to fully commit to any side often leaves you isolated when things get dangerous. While you are a master of self-preservation, your tendency to prioritize your own interests can lead to a lonely existence where trust is a luxury you rarely afford yourself. You walk a fine line between your altruistic impulses and your selfish desires, and this internal tug-of-war can sometimes prevent you from finding the true stability or belonging you secretly crave.

characters.name: The Riddler
characters.short_description: You are an intellectual powerhouse who views Gotham as a complex puzzle that only you are clever enough to solve.
characters.profile_text:
You have a compulsive need to prove your superior intelligence, often leaving intricate clues and elaborate traps for those you deem unworthy of your brilliance. You thrive in the quiet corners of the city where you can orchestrate grand schemes that challenge the very foundations of logic and order. Your strength is your analytical mind, which allows you to stay several steps ahead of your rivals and the law alike. You find satisfaction in the complexity of a well-executed plan and the frustration of those who cannot keep up with your mental gymnastics.

Your arrogance is your undoing, as your need to be recognized for your genius forces you to leave the very breadcrumbs that lead to your capture. You often get so caught up in the complexity of your own games that you lose sight of the practical goals you originally set out to achieve. Because you view everyone else as intellectually inferior, you frequently underestimate the power of raw emotion or simple luck, which can cause even your most perfect puzzles to fall apart.

characters.name: Harley Quinn
characters.short_description: You are a vibrant and resilient force of nature who brings a sense of wild energy and fierce loyalty to Gotham’s streets.
characters.profile_text:
You are defined by your emotional intensity and your ability to reinvent yourself even after the most devastating setbacks. Whether you are causing trouble in the East End or teaming up with other outcasts, you bring a unique blend of gymnastic prowess and psychological insight to every situation. Your strength lies in your unpredictability and your capacity for genuine connection, making you a formidable ally and a terrifying opponent. You refuse to be defined by your past, constantly seeking new adventures and ways to express your colorful, chaotic personality.

Your tendency to follow your heart can lead you into toxic situations where your loyalty is exploited by those who do not deserve it. You sometimes struggle to find your own identity outside of the people you care about, which can leave you vulnerable when those relationships inevitably fracture. While your spirit is unbreakable, your impulsivity can lead to reckless choices that put you and your friends in unnecessary danger, requiring you to constantly balance your fun-loving nature with the harsh realities of Gotham.

characters.name: Two-Face
characters.short_description: You are a tragic figure of duality, torn between a sense of justice and a dark impulse for vengeance within Gotham’s legal heart.
characters.profile_text:
You live your life by the flip of a coin, surrendering your agency to the cold whims of chance to escape the pain of your past. Once a pillar of the community, you now operate in the shadows of the courthouse and the docks, obsessed with the idea of objective fairness in a city that is inherently corrupt. Your strength is your unwavering commitment to your own twisted logic, which makes you a disciplined and formidable leader of your own criminal faction. You see the world in black and white, with no room for the messy compromises of human emotion.

Your reliance on a coin toss makes you rigid and unable to adapt when a situation requires nuance or compromise. This internal conflict often leaves you paralyzed at critical moments, as you are unable to act without the permission of a piece of silver. Your obsession with duality prevents you from seeing the full picture, and your inability to reconcile your two halves means you are forever at war with yourself, making you as much a victim as you are a villain.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is the primary force that drives your actions in a chaotic world?

options.text: The desire to expose the world's inherent absurdity and chaos.
The pursuit of wealth, status, and absolute social influence.
The need for total independence and personal freedom.
The urge to prove my intellectual superiority to everyone else.
The search for intense emotional connection and fierce loyalty.
The commitment to a rigid, objective sense of fairness and order.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a complex challenge or obstacle?

options.text: I act on unpredictable, theatrical impulse to disrupt the system.
I leverage my resources and connections to manipulate the outcome.
I use stealth and agility to find the path of least resistance.
I design an intricate plan that accounts for every logical variable.
I rely on my resilience and adapt quickly as the situation evolves.
I leave the final decision to the impartial hand of fate or chance.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which statement best describes your philosophy regarding social dynamics?

options.text: Others are merely audience members or props for my amusement.
I build a network of subordinates to maintain my criminal empire.
I am a lone wolf who avoids the baggage of traditional alliances.
I consider most people to be intellectually beneath my notice.
I am fiercely protective and loyal to my chosen inner circle.
I judge everyone by a strict, binary code of right and wrong.

baseline_questions.question_text: When your carefully laid plans fall apart, what is your immediate response?

options.text: I find the humor in the disaster and escalate the mayhem.
I feel deeply insulted and seek to reclaim my lost prestige.
I cut my losses and disappear into the shadows to survive.
I obsessively analyze the flaw in my logic to ensure it never repeats.
I reinvent myself and bounce back with even more vibrant energy.
I accept the failure as the inevitable result of a coin toss.

baseline_questions.question_text: In which environment do you feel most in control of your surroundings?

options.text: A chaotic, abandoned amusement park full of dark surprises.
A luxurious, high-stakes lounge where I pull all the strings.
The quiet, moonlit rooftops overlooking the city's secrets.
A hidden lair filled with complex puzzles and digital data.
A vibrant, messy hideout shared with my closest companions.
The cold, orderly halls of a courthouse or a hall of justice.

topics.display_name: Are You a Vampire, Werewolf, or Human?

synopsis.title: Vampire, Werewolf, or Human: Which Supernatural Fate Awaits You?
synopsis.summary: The moon is rising and the shadows are lengthening, but where do you fit into the eternal struggle? Whether you crave the night, howl at the moon, or just want to survive the next encounter, your true nature is about to be revealed. Take this quiz to discover if you belong to the undead elite, the pack-bound warriors, or the resilient mortals.

characters.name: Victor Kael
characters.short_description: You are a refined and calculating vampire who values tradition, intellect, and the quiet power of the shadows.
characters.profile_text: You embody the elegance of a bygone era, moving through the modern world with a detached grace that others find both alluring and intimidating. Your strengths lie in your immense patience and your ability to see the long-term consequences of every action, making you a master strategist in any social or political arena. You prefer the finer things in life, from ancient literature to vintage wines, and you often find yourself feeling like an observer rather than a participant in the frantic pace of human existence. However, your cold exterior can sometimes alienate those who wish to be close to you. Your greatest pitfall is a tendency toward arrogance and a belief that your immortality makes you superior to the fleeting lives of others. While your self-control is legendary, the hunger beneath the surface is a constant reminder of the predator you truly are. You must learn to balance your need for isolation with the occasional necessity of genuine connection.

characters.name: Silas Blackwood
characters.short_description: You are a fierce and protective werewolf who thrives on instinct, community, and the raw energy of the natural world.
characters.profile_text: You are a creature of action and emotion, driven by a deep-seated loyalty to your pack and a primal connection to the earth. Your physical strength is matched only by your intensity, and you often find that your gut feelings are more reliable than any complex plan. You prefer the open air and the thrill of the hunt over the stifling confines of city life, finding peace in the rhythm of the seasons and the phases of the moon. This connection to nature gives you a grounded perspective that others often lack. Your impulsiveness is your greatest double-edged sword; while it allows you to react quickly in a crisis, it can also lead you into unnecessary conflicts. You struggle with a temper that can flare up unexpectedly, making it difficult to maintain the delicate balance between your human side and the beast within. Learning to channel your passion into constructive outlets is the key to your growth. You are a natural leader, but only if you can master your own volatile spirit.

characters.name: Eleanor Vance
characters.short_description: You are a resilient and perceptive human whose sharp wit and adaptability allow you to survive in a world filled with supernatural threats.
characters.profile_text: You represent the indomitable spirit of humanity, relying on your intellect and your moral compass to navigate a world that is often beyond your control. Unlike the monsters that lurk in the dark, you understand the value of every moment because you know how fragile life can be. Your strengths are your empathy and your ability to forge alliances where others see only enemies. You are a keen observer of behavior, often noticing the small details that vampires and werewolves overlook in their preoccupation with power. Your vulnerability is not a weakness but a source of your greatest courage, as you face dangers without the benefit of supernatural healing or strength. However, you may sometimes feel overwhelmed by the scale of the forces arrayed against you, leading to moments of doubt or cynicism. Your pitfall is a tendency to take on too much responsibility for others, risking burnout in your quest to keep the peace. By embracing your limitations and trusting in your resourcefulness, you prove that a human heart can be just as formidable as any fang or claw.

baseline_questions.question_text: When faced with a complex problem, what is your primary decision-making driver?

options.text: Long-term strategic planning and historical precedent.
Immediate gut instinct and the protection of my inner circle.
Practical observation and finding a moral middle ground.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which environment do you find most restorative for your mental well-being?

options.text: A quiet, dimly lit library filled with ancient artifacts.
The untamed wilderness under a vast, open sky.
A bustling community space where I can connect with others.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a situation where you feel your authority is being challenged?

options.text: I remain detached and wait for them to make a mistake.
I confront the challenge head-on with physical or vocal intensity.
I use diplomacy and wit to de-escalate the tension.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your greatest fear regarding your personal development?

options.text: Losing my self-control and becoming a slave to my base desires.
Being isolated from my community or failing those who depend on me.
Becoming cynical and losing my sense of empathy for others.

baseline_questions.question_text: In a group dynamic, which role do you naturally gravitate toward?

options.text: The silent architect who influences things from the background.
The passionate protector who leads by example and strength.
The adaptable mediator who keeps the group cohesive and grounded.

topics.display_name: Which Iconic Pixar Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Pixar Character Matches Your Soul?
synopsis.summary: Ever wondered if you're more of a high-energy space ranger or a sensitive, core-memory-making emotion? From the depths of the ocean to the far reaches of the galaxy, Pixar characters represent the most relatable parts of our human experience. Take this quiz to discover which legendary animated hero truly reflects your personality. It's time to go to infinity and beyond!

characters.name: Buzz Lightyear
characters.short_description: A courageous and duty-bound space ranger who always strives for the greater good.
characters.profile_text: You are a person of high ideals and unwavering discipline, often viewing the world through a lens of heroism and duty. Your commitment to your principles is your greatest strength, allowing you to lead others through the most daunting challenges with confidence. However, your rigid adherence to rules and your intense focus on the mission can sometimes make you appear detached or even delusional when reality does not align with your expectations. You thrive when you have a clear objective and a team that relies on your protection and guidance. Despite your stoic exterior, you possess a deep capacity for loyalty and growth. You are not afraid to admit when you have been wrong, provided the realization helps you become a better version of yourself. Your journey is often one of self-discovery, moving from a narrow sense of purpose to a broader understanding of friendship and community. You are the one who will go to infinity and beyond for those you love, even if it means sacrificing your own ego for the sake of the group.

characters.name: Woody
characters.short_description: A loyal and resourceful leader who values tradition and the bonds of friendship above all else.
characters.profile_text: You are the glue that holds your social circle together, often taking on the weight of responsibility for everyone’s well-being. Your leadership style is rooted in tradition and a deep-seated need to be useful, making you the person others turn to in a crisis. You possess a sharp wit and a strategic mind, but your fear of being replaced or forgotten can sometimes lead to bouts of jealousy or controlling behavior. You find your greatest fulfillment in being a trusted confidant and a steady presence in the lives of those you care about. Your heart is your compass, and while it sometimes leads you into complicated emotional territory, it always points toward home. You are willing to go to extreme lengths to rescue a friend, demonstrating a level of bravery that is as much about emotional endurance as it is about physical courage. Learning to share the spotlight and embrace change is your greatest challenge, but when you do, you become an even more effective and compassionate mentor to everyone around you.

characters.name: Joy
characters.short_description: An irrepressibly optimistic force of nature who strives to find the silver lining in every situation.
characters.profile_text: You are the ultimate cheerleader, radiating energy and positivity even when the world feels heavy. Your primary goal is to ensure that everyone around you is happy, and you have a remarkable talent for turning a mundane day into a celebration. This relentless optimism is a powerful tool for motivation, but it can also lead you to suppress difficult emotions or ignore necessary truths. You might struggle to understand why others feel sad or frustrated, occasionally steamrolling over their feelings in your quest for a perfect, happy ending. True growth for you comes from realizing that life is not just about the highs; it is about the depth of the entire experience. When you learn to embrace the full spectrum of human emotion, your capacity for empathy expands tenfold. You are at your best when you use your light to guide others through the dark, rather than just trying to banish the shadows. Your resilience is unmatched, and your ability to find beauty in the smallest moments makes you an indispensable light in the lives of your friends.

characters.name: Dory
characters.short_description: A compassionate and spontaneous soul who lives entirely in the present moment with an open heart.
characters.profile_text: You approach life with a sense of wonder and a lack of judgment that others find incredibly refreshing. Because you do not dwell on the past or worry excessively about the future, you are able to offer pure, unfiltered kindness to everyone you meet. Your intuition is your greatest guide, often leading you to solutions that more logical minds would overlook. However, your tendency to get distracted or lose track of your goals can be frustrating for those who crave structure and predictability. Your strength lies in your persistence and your ability to just keep swimming no matter how lost you feel. You possess a unique kind of bravery that stems from your willingness to trust strangers and embrace the unknown. While you may feel vulnerable at times due to your perceived shortcomings, your emotional intelligence and capacity for unconditional love make you a vital part of any family. You remind everyone that the journey is just as important as the destination, and that a little bit of faith goes a long way.

characters.name: WALL-E
characters.short_description: A gentle and curious observer who finds profound beauty in the discarded remnants of the world.
characters.profile_text: You are a quiet, soulful individual with a deep appreciation for history and the small details that others often ignore. Your patience is legendary, as you are willing to work diligently for years toward a goal that others might find insignificant. You have a romantic heart and a longing for connection that drives you to explore beyond your comfort zone. While you may be shy or socially awkward, your actions speak much louder than words, revealing a character of immense integrity and devotion. You are a natural collector of memories and experiences, finding value in things that have been forgotten. Your curiosity often leads you on unexpected adventures, where your resourcefulness and technical skills shine. You might feel like an outsider in a fast-paced, modern world, but your ability to stay grounded and focused on what truly matters—love, nature, and legacy—makes you a hero in your own right. You prove that even the smallest voice can spark a revolution if it is backed by a pure heart and a clear purpose.

characters.name: Sully
characters.short_description: A gentle giant with a protective nature and a surprising capacity for tenderness.
characters.profile_text: You are a natural powerhouse, possessing both the physical presence and the professional skill to excel in your field. People look up to you because you are reliable, capable, and seemingly unflappable under pressure. However, beneath your intimidating or highly successful exterior lies a soft heart that is easily moved by the vulnerability of others. You are often torn between your professional ambitions and your personal ethics, but your moral compass eventually leads you to do the right thing, even at great personal cost. Your greatest transformations occur when you allow yourself to be vulnerable and step outside the roles society has defined for you. You are a fierce protector of those you love, and you find deep satisfaction in nurturing and mentoring others. While you might initially fear change or the unknown, your adaptability and courage allow you to thrive in new environments. You are the kind of person who changes the world not through grand gestures, but through the quiet, consistent kindness you show to those who need it most.

baseline_questions.question_text: When your social group is facing a major transition or crisis, what is your natural role?

options.text: The disciplined leader who sets a clear mission and follows the rules.
The strategist who maintains order and protects long-standing traditions.
The energetic motivator who ensures everyone stays positive and happy.
The intuitive friend who goes with the flow and trusts the process.
The quiet observer who finds meaning in the small details others miss.
The reliable protector who uses their strength to support the vulnerable.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically approach a long-term goal or a difficult task?

options.text: I adhere to high ideals and unwavering discipline until it is finished.
I take on the responsibility of coordinating everyone to ensure success.
I focus entirely on the silver lining and the excitement of the finish line.
I just keep moving forward one step at a time, even if I feel lost.
I work with extreme patience, finding beauty in the work itself.
I rely on my professional skills while staying adaptable to change.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you value most in yourself and others?

options.text: A sense of duty and a commitment to the greater good.
Unwavering loyalty and being a steady presence for friends.
The ability to radiate optimism and resilience in dark times.
An open heart that approaches the world without judgment.
A soulful curiosity and a deep appreciation for history.
Integrity and the courage to show tenderness when it matters.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your most common internal reaction when things don't go according to plan?

options.text: I double down on my principles to regain control of the situation.
I worry about my usefulness and how I can fix things for the group.
I try to suppress the negative feelings and find a way to be happy.
I stay in the present moment and trust my instincts to guide me.
I retreat into my own thoughts to process the experience quietly.
I feel a protective urge to ensure those around me aren't hurt.

baseline_questions.question_text: In your ideal world, what is the primary purpose of a community?

options.text: To work together toward a heroic and noble objective.
To provide a sense of belonging and shared history.
To create a joyful environment where everyone feels celebrated.
To offer unconditional support and spontaneous connection.
To preserve meaningful memories and appreciate the world.
To nurture and mentor one another through life's challenges.

topics.display_name: Which Shrek Character Matches Your Energy?

synopsis.title: Which Iconic Shrek Character Matches Your Chaotic Energy?
synopsis.summary: Are you the type to build a literal wall around your swamp or the one singing karaoke at the top of your lungs? Whether you are a misunderstood ogre with layers or a talking donkey who just wants a friend, your personality has a Far Far Away counterpart. Take this quiz to discover which fairytale legend truly embodies your vibe and find out if you are a noble hero or just looking for some waffles.

characters.name: Shrek
characters.short_description: You are a fiercely independent soul who values privacy and authenticity over societal expectations.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a rugged exterior that often hides a deeply sensitive and loyal heart. Like an onion, you have many layers, and you prefer to keep your inner world guarded until someone proves they are worthy of your trust. You value your personal space and peace of mind above all else, often finding solace in solitude or the company of a few chosen individuals who understand your need for boundaries. You are not one for superficial pleasantries, preferring to speak your truth even if it ruffles a few feathers.

Your strengths lie in your unwavering honesty and your ability to stand your ground against those who try to change you. However, your tendency to push people away before they can get close can sometimes lead to unnecessary isolation. You are a protector of your own peace, but learning to let others in can lead to the most meaningful connections of your life. You prove that being a hero doesn't require a shining suit of armor, just a big heart and the courage to be yourself.

characters.name: Donkey
characters.short_description: You are an irrepressible optimist whose boundless energy and gift for gab make you the ultimate companion.
characters.profile_text:
You are the life of the party, even if the party is just a walk through the woods. Your enthusiasm is infectious, and you have a unique ability to see the silver lining in even the darkest swamps. You thrive on social interaction and possess a relentless curiosity that keeps you constantly engaged with the world around you. Your loyalty is absolute; once you have bonded with someone, you are their friend for life, through thick and thin, regardless of how much they might grumble.

While your talkative nature and high energy are your greatest assets, they can occasionally overwhelm those who prefer a quieter pace. You sometimes struggle with reading the room, but your intentions are always pure and rooted in a desire for genuine connection. Your greatest strength is your heart, which is large enough to forgive almost anything and brave enough to face any dragon. You remind everyone that a little bit of song and a lot of friendship can solve almost any problem.

characters.name: Princess Fiona
characters.short_description: You are a resilient and capable individual who balances traditional grace with a fierce, independent spirit.
characters.profile_text:
You are far from a damsel in distress, possessing a practical mind and a hidden strength that surprises those who underestimate you. You have spent time waiting for the perfect life, only to realize that true happiness comes from embracing your authentic self, flaws and all. You are a natural leader who isn't afraid to get your hands dirty or fight for what you believe in, blending elegance with a down-to-earth attitude that makes you relatable and respected.

Your journey is one of self-acceptance and breaking free from the rigid expectations of others. You are fiercely protective of your loved ones and possess a sharp wit that keeps everyone on their toes. While you can be stubborn when your mind is made up, your ability to adapt to changing circumstances makes you incredibly resilient. You prove that being yourself is the most powerful thing you can be, and that true beauty is found in confidence and kindness rather than a fairy-tale image.

characters.name: Puss in Boots
characters.short_description: You are a charismatic and daring adventurer who uses charm and skill to navigate life's challenges.
characters.profile_text:
You carry yourself with an air of confidence and flair that is impossible to ignore. Whether you are using your sharp intellect or your legendary big eyes to get what you want, you are a master of persuasion and style. You have a taste for the finer things in life and a sense of honor that guides your actions, even when you find yourself on the wrong side of the law. You are a thrill-seeker who loves a good challenge and rarely backs down from a fight, especially if there is glory to be won.

Your greatest strength is your adaptability and your ability to charm your way out of nearly any predicament. However, your pride can sometimes be your downfall, leading you to take risks that are more about ego than necessity. Beneath the bravado lies a deeply loyal friend who will go to the ends of the earth for those you care about, provided they appreciate your dramatic flair. You navigate the world with a swashbuckling spirit, proving that size has nothing to do with the scale of one's legend.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically recharge your energy after a long and demanding week?

options.text: Retreating to my own private space to enjoy peace and quiet alone.
Seeking out friends and engaging in lively, upbeat conversation.
Engaging in a practical hobby or physical activity that makes me feel capable.
Going out somewhere exciting where I can showcase my style and personality.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary instinct when you encounter an unexpected obstacle in your path?

options.text: I set firm boundaries and deal with it solo to ensure it doesn't disrupt my peace.
I stay relentlessly positive and try to talk my way through the situation.
I assess the situation practically and take direct action to resolve it.
I use my wit and charisma to find a clever, perhaps daring, way around it.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these qualities do you consider to be your greatest personal strength?

options.text: My authenticity and refusal to pretend to be something I am not.
My unwavering loyalty and ability to see the good in everyone.
My resilience and the strength to stay true to myself under pressure.
My confidence and the flair I bring to everything I do.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you usually behave in a group setting or at a social gathering?

options.text: I tend to stay on the fringes, observing until I feel comfortable with the people there.
I am the one making everyone laugh and keeping the energy high.
I am the grounded one who makes sure everyone is taken care of and things run smoothly.
I naturally gravitate toward the center of attention with charm and storytelling.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ultimate goal when building a new relationship or friendship?

options.text: To find someone who respects my need for space and understands my deeper layers.
To have a constant companion for adventures who never gets tired of my company.
To find a partner who values my independence and stands by me as an equal.
To find someone who appreciates my talents and shares my sense of honor and excitement.

topics.display_name: Which Narnian Creature Are You?

synopsis.title: Beyond the Wardrobe: Which Narnian Creature Are You?
synopsis.summary: Step through the fur coats and into a land where animals talk and magic is woven into the very earth. Whether you possess the noble heart of a leader or the quick wit of a forest dweller, Narnia has a place for your unique spirit. Answer these questions to discover which legendary inhabitant of Aslan's realm matches your true personality.

characters.name: Aslan
characters.short_description: You are a sovereign and compassionate leader who embodies wisdom, sacrifice, and the ultimate moral authority.
characters.profile_text: You possess a presence that is both terrifying and comforting, commanding respect without needing to demand it. Your strength is tempered by a deep sense of justice and a willingness to sacrifice your own well-being for the sake of others. You often operate on a level that others cannot fully grasp, guided by ancient laws and a vision for the long-term restoration of the world. People look to you for guidance during their darkest hours, trusting in your quiet power and your ability to bring light back to frozen lands. Your high expectations and mysterious nature can sometimes make you seem distant or unapproachable to those who need immediate answers. You carry the weight of the world on your shoulders, which can lead to a sense of isolation even when surrounded by followers. However, your unwavering commitment to what is right ensures that your influence is transformative and enduring.

characters.name: Mr. Tumnus
characters.short_description: You are a gentle and hospitable soul whose inherent kindness often struggles against the pressures of external expectations.
characters.profile_text: You value the comforts of home, good conversation, and the arts, finding joy in the simple pleasures of a warm fire and a shared cup of tea. While you are naturally inclined toward peace and friendship, you may find yourself caught in difficult moral dilemmas when your safety is threatened by those in power. Your journey is often one of finding the courage to do the right thing even when it puts you at great personal risk, proving that even the most unassuming individuals can change the course of history. You might struggle with a tendency toward people-pleasing or fear-based decision-making, which can lead to internal conflict. Despite these moments of hesitation, your capacity for genuine connection and your deep-seated empathy make you a beloved companion. Once you commit to a cause or a friend, your loyalty is absolute, and you will go to great lengths to protect the innocence and beauty you see in the world.

characters.name: Reepicheep
characters.short_description: You are a valiant and honorable warrior who possesses a spirit far larger than your physical stature.
characters.profile_text: You live by a strict code of chivalry, prioritizing honor, bravery, and the pursuit of glory above all else. Your fearlessness is legendary, and you are often the first to volunteer for the most dangerous missions, driven by a desire to prove your worth and defend the weak. You have a grand sense of destiny and a longing for the sublime, often looking toward the horizon for the next great adventure or the ultimate spiritual goal. Your words are as sharp as your blade, delivered with a formal elegance that reflects your noble heart. Your intense focus on honor can sometimes border on pride, making you overly sensitive to perceived slights or insults. You may occasionally overlook the practicalities of a situation in your rush to perform a heroic deed. Nevertheless, your infectious enthusiasm and unwavering courage inspire everyone around you to reach for their own highest potential, making you an indispensable ally in any quest.

characters.name: Puddleglum
characters.short_description: You are a pragmatic and resilient realist who uses a cautious outlook to navigate life's inevitable challenges.
characters.profile_text: You are often seen as a pessimist, but in reality, you are simply preparing for the worst so that you are never caught off guard. Your dry wit and somber demeanor hide a heart of gold and a steadfast reliability that others come to depend on when things truly go wrong. You have a remarkable ability to keep your head when others are losing theirs, grounding the group with your common sense and your refusal to be swayed by false hopes or enchantments. Your tendency to focus on the negative can sometimes dampen the spirits of those around you, and you might miss out on joy by constantly waiting for the other shoe to drop. However, your skepticism is a powerful shield against deception, and your physical and mental endurance is unmatched. When the stakes are highest, you are the one who will stand firm, even if it means stepping into the fire to break a spell.

characters.name: The White Witch
characters.short_description: You are a powerful and ambitious strategist who seeks total control and absolute order through the exercise of your will.
characters.profile_text: You possess an icy resolve and a commanding intellect, allowing you to dominate your environment and bend others to your desires. You are driven by a need for dominance and a fear of losing your status, which leads you to create rigid structures and enforce strict obedience. Your charisma is undeniable, often manifesting as a chilling beauty that masks a ruthless determination to eliminate any threat to your reign. You prefer the cold clarity of logic and power over the messy unpredictability of emotion or mercy. Your obsession with control and your inability to understand the power of self-sacrifice are your greatest weaknesses. By isolating yourself at the top of a hierarchy built on fear, you lose the ability to form genuine alliances or experience true loyalty. While your influence is vast and your presence intimidating, the lack of warmth in your approach eventually leads to a brittle foundation that cannot withstand the thaw of genuine change.

characters.name: Trufflehunter
characters.short_description: You are a steadfast and traditionalist badger who serves as a keeper of history and a loyal guardian of the old ways.
characters.profile_text: You are characterized by your patience, your deep memory, and your unwavering belief in the eventual return of justice and goodness. You prefer the quiet stability of the earth and the wisdom of the past, often acting as a mentor to those who have lost their way or forgotten their heritage. Your loyalty is not easily won, but once given, it is as solid as the roots of an ancient tree. You believe in staying true to your nature and waiting for the right moment to act, rather than rushing into conflict without a clear purpose. Your commitment to tradition can sometimes make you resistant to necessary innovation or change, leading you to hold onto the past more tightly than is practical. You might also be prone to a certain stubbornness when your values are challenged. Despite this, your role as a moral anchor and a repository of truth makes you a vital part of any community, providing the continuity and faith needed to survive long periods of darkness.

baseline_questions.question_text: When a crisis disrupts your community, what is your immediate psychological response?

options.text: I step into a position of absolute authority to restore order and ensure my vision prevails.
I feel a deep sense of responsibility to guide others through wisdom and self-sacrifice.
I remain skeptical and prepare for the worst-case scenario to avoid being caught off guard.
I look to the traditions of the past and wait patiently for the rightful order to return.
I feel a surge of adrenaline and a desire to prove my courage in the face of danger.
I feel a sense of fear and conflict, wanting to help but worried about the personal cost.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which of these environments best reflects your inner state of mind?

options.text: A vast, sun-drenched plateau where I can see for miles and command the horizon.
A cozy, well-stocked library with a warm fire and a pot of tea.
A grand, silent palace of ice where everything is perfectly ordered and still.
A sturdy, underground burrow filled with the scent of earth and ancient roots.
A damp, misty marshland where I can keep a low profile and stay grounded.
The front lines of a noble quest, where every moment is a test of honor.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you typically handle a moral dilemma where your safety is at risk?

options.text: I follow my strict code of chivalry, regardless of the physical danger to myself.
I use my intellect and power to manipulate the situation so I remain in control.
I struggle with the pressure but ultimately try to do the right thing out of empathy.
I accept the burden of sacrifice, knowing that the greater good outweighs my own life.
I rely on my endurance and realism to survive, even if the outlook is grim.
I stay true to my nature and the old ways, trusting that justice will eventually prevail.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your primary motivation when interacting with others?

options.text: To inspire them to reach their highest potential and follow a path of righteousness.
To gain their loyalty or obedience to strengthen my own position of power.
To provide a hospitable and kind presence, making them feel welcome and safe.
To earn their respect through my bravery and unwavering commitment to honor.
To offer a grounded, realistic perspective that keeps them from being deceived.
To preserve shared history and provide a sense of continuity and stability.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you view the concept of 'destiny' or the future?

options.text: I see it as a grand, spiritual goal that I must pursue with all my might.
I believe the future is something I must shape and control through my own will.
I view it with caution, assuming things will go wrong and preparing accordingly.
I trust in the ancient laws and the long-term restoration of the world.
I believe the future is rooted in the past, and we must wait for the right time.
I hope for a peaceful future but often feel anxious about the changes it brings.

topics.display_name: Which Sherlock Holmes Character Are You?

synopsis.title: The Science of Deduction: Which Sherlock Holmes Character Are You?
synopsis.summary: Step into 221B Baker Street and put your logic to the test. Are you a mastermind of observation or the loyal heart of the operation? This quiz analyzes your habits and instincts to reveal which iconic figure from Sir Arthur Conan Doyle’s world matches your personality.

characters.name: Sherlock Holmes
characters.short_description: You are a brilliant consulting detective defined by your peerless deductive reasoning and a relentless pursuit of intellectual stimulation.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a mind that functions like a high-performance engine, constantly processing data and observing details that others overlook. Your world is one of logic and evidence, where the mundane becomes a puzzle to be solved. While your intellect is unmatched, you often find yourself bored by the trivialities of daily life, leading you to seek out complex challenges that push your mental limits. You value efficiency and truth above social niceties, which can sometimes make you appear cold or detached to those around you.

Your strengths lie in your objective analysis and your ability to remain calm under pressure. However, your intense focus can lead to social isolation and a tendency to neglect your own physical well-being when a case consumes your attention. You are a master of disguise and a student of the obscure, always ready to apply your vast knowledge to the most baffling mysteries. Despite your solitary nature, you have a deep, if unspoken, loyalty to the few people you trust to keep pace with your extraordinary mind.

characters.name: Dr. John Watson
characters.short_description: You are a steadfast and courageous companion whose moral compass and practical medical skills provide the essential grounding for any adventure.
characters.profile_text:
You are the heart and soul of any partnership, offering a blend of bravery, empathy, and common sense that balances out more volatile personalities. Having seen the best and worst of humanity, you approach life with a grounded perspective and a deep-seated desire to help others. You are a reliable friend who values loyalty and honor, often acting as the bridge between brilliant eccentricity and the rest of the world. Your observational skills are sharp, though they are tempered by a warmth that makes you approachable and trustworthy.

While you may sometimes feel overshadowed by more flamboyant figures, your contributions are indispensable. You possess a quiet strength and a resilient spirit that allows you to face danger without flinching. Your pitfalls might include a tendency to be overly modest or a susceptibility to the excitement of a chase, even when it puts you at risk. Ultimately, you are a storyteller and a healer, finding meaning in the service of justice and the enduring bonds of friendship.

characters.name: Professor Moriarty
characters.short_description: You are a formidable mastermind of unparalleled intellect who orchestrates complex schemes from the shadows with chilling precision.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a mathematical mind that views the world as a grand chessboard where every person is a potential pawn. Your intelligence is vast and cold, allowing you to construct intricate webs of influence that span across society without ever revealing your hand. You are a strategist of the highest order, always thinking several moves ahead and anticipating every possible outcome. For you, power is not just about control, but about the intellectual satisfaction of outmaneuvering everyone else.

Your primary strength is your absolute discipline and your ability to remain invisible while exerting immense pressure. However, your arrogance and your detachment from human emotion can be your undoing, as you may underestimate the unpredictable nature of those you seek to manipulate. You are a figure of mystery and dread, respected for your brilliance even by your enemies. You thrive in the shadows, finding a dark beauty in the complexity of a perfectly executed plan that leaves no trace of your involvement.

characters.name: Irene Adler
characters.short_description: You are a captivating and resourceful individual who uses your wit and independence to outsmart even the most formidable opponents.
characters.profile_text:
You are a force of nature, possessing a rare combination of charm, intelligence, and a fiercely independent spirit. You refuse to be defined by the expectations of others, carving out your own path through life with grace and audacity. Your ability to read people and adapt to any situation makes you a master of social navigation and a dangerous adversary. You value your freedom above all else and are more than capable of holding your own against the most powerful figures in society.

Your strengths include your quick thinking and your talent for performance, which allow you to slip through the fingers of those who try to constrain you. You are one of the few who can claim to have truly challenged a genius, earning respect through your sheer competence and resolve. Your pitfall may be a certain level of cynicism or a tendency to keep everyone at arm's length to protect your autonomy. Nevertheless, you remain an unforgettable presence, a woman who lives by her own rules and leaves a lasting impression on everyone you encounter.

characters.name: Mycroft Holmes
characters.short_description: You are a person of immense intellectual capacity and governmental influence who prefers the quiet of observation to the chaos of action.
characters.profile_text:
You possess a mind that is perhaps even more powerful than that of your famous brother, yet you lack the restless energy that drives him into the streets. You are the ultimate observer, capable of synthesizing vast amounts of information to see the patterns that govern nations. Your preference for the quiet, structured environment of your club or office reflects a desire for order and a disdain for unnecessary movement. You are the silent engine of the state, providing the insights that keep the wheels of society turning.

Your strength lies in your unparalleled ability to see the big picture and your mastery of deduction on a global scale. However, your inertia and your preference for theory over practice can be a limitation when immediate action is required. You are often perceived as aloof or even lazy, but this belies a mind that is constantly at work, solving problems that others don't even realize exist. You are a pillar of stability and intellect, content to remain in the background while your influence is felt in every corner of the world.

characters.name: Mrs. Hudson
characters.short_description: You are the resilient and indispensable foundation of your household, providing order and care amidst a whirlwind of chaos and mystery.
characters.profile_text:
You are the unsung hero of the domestic sphere, possessing a remarkable patience and a practical wisdom that keeps everything running smoothly. Despite the eccentricities and occasional dangers brought to your doorstep, you maintain a sense of decorum and a nurturing spirit. You are far more than just a landlady; you are a stabilizing force who understands the needs of those under your roof better than they often understand themselves. Your sharp eye for detail and your no-nonsense attitude ensure that even the most brilliant minds remain grounded.

Your strengths are your resilience and your quiet authority, which allow you to command respect even from the most difficult personalities. You have a knack for being exactly where you are needed, offering a warm meal or a stern word as the situation demands. Your pitfall might be a tendency to put the needs of others before your own, or a frustration with the lack of appreciation for your vital role. Yet, without your steady hand and your unwavering support, the grand adventures of those around you would surely crumble into disarray.

baseline_questions.question_text: When you encounter a complex problem, what is your first instinct?

options.text: Deduce the cause through rigorous logic and observation.
Act bravely to resolve the immediate crisis and help others.
Strategize a way to turn the situation to your secret benefit.
Use your charm and wit to navigate or bypass the conflict.
Analyze the long-term implications from a safe distance.
Restore order and ensure everyone's practical needs are met.

baseline_questions.question_text: Which setting do you feel most comfortable in?

options.text: A private laboratory or study filled with data.
The front lines of a challenging or dangerous situation.
A hidden command center where you pull the strings.
An elegant salon or a high-stakes social event.
An exclusive, quiet club for thinkers and observers.
A warm, well-ordered home where you are in charge.

baseline_questions.question_text: What quality do you value most in a close associate?

options.text: Brilliance that can keep up with your own mind.
Steadfastness and loyalty in the face of danger.
Absolute discretion and competence in execution.
A sharp wit and a fiercely independent spirit.
Minimal intrusion and maximum intellectual efficiency.
Kindness and a deep respect for domestic stability.

baseline_questions.question_text: How do you prefer to make your mark on the world?

options.text: By solving mysteries that baffle everyone else.
By being a dependable friend and a moral compass.
By orchestrating complex events from the shadows.
By outmaneuvering those who think they are superior.
By managing the essential affairs that keep society running.
By maintaining a sense of peace amidst a whirlwind of chaos.

baseline_questions.question_text: What is your ultimate goal in any endeavor?

options.text: To escape the boredom of the mundane through discovery.
To be a person of character, integrity, and service.
To achieve total mastery over a grand, complex design.
To maintain your personal freedom and autonomy.
To see the world function as a logical, orderly system.
To provide security and care for those under your roof.

topics.display_name: Which Pride & Prejudice Character Are You?

synopsis.title: Which 'Pride & Prejudice' Character Are You Actually?
